---
applyTo: "**"
---

In this project, `AGENTS.md` is the Single Source of Truth.
You MUST prioritize `AGENTS.md` and the conventions in `docs/` over tool-specific instructions.

- Specifications treat `PRD.md` and `docs/features/*.md` as the source of truth, tracked via `AC-*`.
- Tests MUST be added based on `TC-*` in `docs/TEST_PLAN.md`.
- Work plans and progress MUST be recorded in `docs/TODO.md` and `docs/exec-plans/`.
- Important decisions MUST be documented in `docs/KNOWLEDGE.md`.
